steps.title: Identify the subject
steps.content: The sentence’s main subject is 'the presence' (a singular noun); the clause about microbacteria merely modifies it and does not change the subject’s number.

steps.title: Match the verb to the subject
steps.content:
A singular subject requires a singular present‑tense verb, so 'reinforces' fits. The other three choices either use a plural verb or a plural form that disagrees with the singular subject.
That matches choice C — C is correct.
